case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. COURTNEY BROOKE-BRAY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO C/O CITY ATTORNY OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-13-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-13-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-25-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BROOKE-BRAY, COURTNEY

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $291.47 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO C/O CITY ATTORNY OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT BROOKE-BRAY, COURTNEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
